files.patch:
@@ -54,7 +54,7 @@ on:
       shard_count:
         description: "Parallel shards"
         required: false
-        default: "50"
+        default: "100"
       item_number:
         description: "Optional single issue/PR number to review"
         required: false
@@ -167,7 +167,7 @@ jobs:
             max_pages="2"
           else
             batch_size="${{ github.event.inputs.batch_size || '5' }}"
-            shard_count="${{ github.event.inputs.shard_count || '50' }}"
+            shard_count="${{ github.event.inputs.shard_count || '100' }}"
             max_pages="250"
           fi
           {
@@ -213,7 +213,7 @@ jobs:
           const plan = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("plan.json", "utf8"));
           console.log(`matrix=${JSON.stringify(plan.matrix)}`);
           console.log(`planned_count=${plan.candidates.length}`);
-          console.log(`planned_capacity=${Number(process.env.BATCH_SIZE || 5) * Number(process.env.SHARD_COUNT || 50)}`);
+          console.log(`planned_capacity=${Number(process.env.BATCH_SIZE || 5) * Number(process.env.SHARD_COUNT || 100)}`);
           console.log(`planned_shards=${plan.matrix.length}`);
           NODE
           cat plan.json

@@ -44,7 +44,7 @@ checkpoint, and status-only commits are intentionally omitted.
 ### Changed
 
 - Switched review runs to GPT-5.5 with high reasoning.
-- Increased sweep throughput over time with larger worker batches, 50 shards,
+- Increased sweep throughput over time with larger worker batches, 100 shards,
   chained continuation runs, and 50-review checkpoints.
 - Made review cadence activity-aware: active items and items created in the last
   7 days are checked hourly, older PRs and young issues are checked daily, and

@@ -203,7 +203,7 @@ Requires Node 24.
 source ~/.profile
 npm install
 npm run build
-npm run plan -- --batch-size 5 --shard-count 50 --max-pages 250 --codex-model gpt-5.5 --codex-reasoning-effort high --codex-service-tier fast
+npm run plan -- --batch-size 5 --shard-count 100 --max-pages 250 --codex-model gpt-5.5 --codex-reasoning-effort high --codex-service-tier fast
 npm run review -- --openclaw-dir ../openclaw --batch-size 5 --max-pages 250 --artifact-dir artifacts/reviews --codex-model gpt-5.5 --codex-reasoning-effort high --codex-service-tier fast --codex-timeout-ms 600000
 npm run apply-artifacts -- --artifact-dir artifacts/reviews
 npm run audit -- --max-pages 250 --sample-limit 25 --update-dashboard
